title: Camden Property Trust Prices $500 Million 5.850% Senior Unsecured Notes Due 2026
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) today announced it has priced a $500 million offering of senior unsecured notes under its existing shelf registration. These three-year notes were issued at 99.997% of par value with a coupon of 5.850%. Interest on the notes is payable semi-annually on May 3 and November 3, with the first payment becoming due and payable on May 3, 2024, and the notes will mature on November 3, 2026. Camden expects to use the net proceeds of approximatel.

title: If I Could Only Own 3 REITs, It Would Be These
text: I own a portfolio of ~25 REITs. I buy so many REITs because I value diversification. But if I could only buy 3 of them, it would be these REITs.

title: Camden Property Trust (CPT) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Kim Callahan – Senior Vice President-Investor Relations Ric Campo – Chairman and Chief Executive Officer Keith Oden – Executive Vice Chairman and President Alex Jessett – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Michael Goldsmith – UBS Brad Heffern – RBC Capital Markets Haendel St. Juste – Mizuho Austin Wurschmidt – KeyBanc Capital Markets Eric Wolfe – Citi Joshua Dennerlein – Bank of America Steve Sakwa – Evercore ISI John Kim – BMO Capital Markets Rich Anderson – Wedbush Connor Mitchell – Piper Sandler Wes Golladay – Baird Robin Lu – Green Street Operator Good day, and welcome to the Camden Property Trust's Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call. All participants will be in listen-only mode.

title: My Oh My, 2 Strong Buys: Residential REITs That Help Me Sleep Well At Night
text: The gap between owning and renting a home is at its widest since 1996, with home prices surging and making it difficult for renters to save for a down payment. Despite rising interest rates, stability in the housing market is maintained due to the disparity between prevailing and locked-in mortgage rates. Sun Communities and Camden Property Trust are highlighted as top-tier REITs that offer stable income and growth potential in the current real estate landscape.

title: Compared to Estimates, Camden (CPT) Q3 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: The headline numbers for Camden (CPT) give insight into how the company performed in the quarter ended September 2023, but it may be worthwhile to compare some of its key metrics to Wall Street estimates and the year-ago actuals.

title: Camden (CPT) Q3 FFO Match Estimates
text: Camden (CPT) came out with quarterly funds from operations (FFO) of $1.73 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to FFO of $1.70 per share a year ago.

title: 18 Buyable Pre-Crash Recovery Equities For October
text: September-October, 2023, Barron's, Bloomberg, and Fortune analysts and reporters combined to list five sets of stocks sorted as: “Recovery Bets.” Those five articles revealed 53 equities, with 42 paying dividends. These new lists focus on financial services, healthcare, and real estate sectors by Barron's along with selected “change the world” stocks from Fortune and ten to watch from Bloomberg.

title: 2 REITs That Could Be Takeover Targets
text: REITs offer an opportunity to buy real estate at a discount. Private equity players are already taking advantage of this. We highlight 2 likely buyout candidates.

title: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
text: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does Camden (CPT) have what it takes?

title: 5 Safe Stocks to Buy Amid Plummeting U.S. Consumer Sentiment
text: We have narrowed our search to five large-cap low-beta stocks with a solid dividend yield. These are: IBM, PEP, KHC, CPT, VICI.

title: Dividend Champion, Contender, And Challenger Highlights: Week Of October 15
text: A weekly summary of dividend activity for Dividend Champions, Contenders, and Challengers. Companies which changed their dividends. Companies with upcoming ex-dividend dates.

title: 3 Once-In-A-Decade REIT Buying Opportunities
text: REITs are offering a once-in-a-decade chance to win big. Valuations are the lowest since 2008-2009. We highlight three "Top Picks" with 50%+ upside potential.

title: Camden Property Trust: Reviewing My Largest Position
text: Camden Property Trust has seen a decline in its stock price due to concerns over higher interest rates and supply impacting its markets. However, the company has a strong balance sheet and a majority of its properties are Class B apartments, which will be less impacted by new supply. Camden also has a compelling valuation and potential for additional upside through opportunistic property acquisitions.

title: Camden Property Trust Announces Third Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call Dates
text: HOUSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) (the “Company”) announced today that its third quarter 2023 earnings will be released after the market closes on Thursday, October 26, 2023. Management will host a conference call on the following day, Friday, October 27, 2023, at 10:00 AM Central Time. Conference Call Domestic Dial-In Number: (888) 317-6003 International Dial-In Number: (412) 317-6061 Passcode: 9996059 Webcast: https://investors.camdenliving.com The Company strongly en.
